title: Post-removal deploy and regression validation
description:
Deploy post-removal stack/runtime and run regression reports to confirm behavior after OpenSearch removal.

Record:
- deployment status
- report IDs
- acceptance summary

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Resumed after disconnect. Running end-to-end validation of S3-only report path and collecting concrete run evidence (report IDs / outputs) for acceptance notes.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Starting live run: scripts/run_score_result_no_vector_topic_memory_report.py --scorecard 1438 --days 30 to capture concrete post-cutover evidence.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Validation run exposed query compatibility bug in ScoreResult source mode (unsupported GraphQL field by score). Applying fix and re-running to collect valid regression evidence.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Live validation still running. Data-selection phase now confirms substantial candidate volume in the new mode (e.g., 441 retained No-explanation items for Patient Cognition, after 3546 fetched records). Awaiting full embedding/clustering completion and final report output.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Applied runtime optimization after slow live validation: one scorecard-window query + local score partitioning. Starting fresh regression run to confirm end-to-end timing and outputs.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Regression evidence captured post-fix: S3 ScoreResult-No report succeeded (report f715b6a6-ebc0-46aa-b967-355a05cf2202, task 1fefef21-80b0-4839-897b-8a51d31f5db0). Verified live pipeline activity: data selection, embeddings, S3 vector index writes, and topic clustering with non-empty output.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Follow-up delivery complete: fix commit b70b2424 pushed to feature/reinforcement-memory and merged into staging as ba91f933. Report evidence remains f715b6a6-ebc0-46aa-b967-355a05cf2202 / task 1fefef21-80b0-4839-897b-8a51d31f5db0.
